subtitle.en: A real Chrome browser you control from code
subtitle.zh: 一個用程式碼就能操控的真實 Chrome 瀏覽器

tagline.en: Open web pages, take screenshots, make PDFs and scrape content — using a headless Chromium that runs on Cloudflare's network.
tagline.zh: 開啟網頁、擷取畫面、產生 PDF、抓取內容——靠跑在 Cloudflare 網路上的無頭（headless）Chromium 完成。

text.en: Browser Rendering gives you a headless browser — a real Chromium with no visible window — running on Cloudflare's network. You control it from code to load pages, click, type, screenshot, export PDFs and pull out content.
text.zh: Browser Rendering 給你一個 headless（無頭，也就是沒有可見視窗）的瀏覽器——一個真正的 Chromium——跑在 Cloudflare 網路上。你用程式碼操控它來載入網頁、點擊、輸入、截圖、輸出 PDF 並擷取內容。

text.en: It works two ways: simple REST API endpoints for one-off jobs (just send a URL, get a screenshot back), or full programmatic control inside a Worker using Puppeteer or Playwright — the popular libraries for driving Chrome.
text.zh: 它有兩種用法：用簡單的 REST API 端點處理一次性工作（送出網址、拿回截圖），或在 Worker 裡用 Puppeteer 或 Playwright（操控 Chrome 的熱門函式庫）完全程式化地操控。

title.en: Think of it like a robot using a browser
title.zh: 把它想成一個會用瀏覽器的機器人

text.en: Imagine a tireless robot that opens Chrome, visits any page, snaps a photo or saves a PDF, copies the text, and never needs a screen. You hand it instructions in code; it does the clicking. That's Browser Rendering.
text.zh: 想像一個不知疲倦的機器人，它打開 Chrome、造訪任何網頁、拍張照或存成 PDF、複製文字，而且完全不需要螢幕。你用程式碼下指令，它替你點擊。這就是 Browser Rendering。

text.en: Running headless Chrome yourself is heavy: it eats memory, crashes, and is hard to scale. Browser Rendering hands you ready browsers on demand, right next to your Workers.
text.zh: 自己跑 headless Chrome 很吃重：耗記憶體、容易崩潰、又難擴充。Browser Rendering 在你需要時直接給你現成的瀏覽器，而且就在 Workers 旁邊。

text.en: Turn any web page into an image or a print-ready PDF — great for previews, receipts or reports.
text.zh: 把任何網頁變成圖片或可列印的 PDF——很適合做預覽、收據或報表。

text.en: Many pages build their content with JavaScript. A real browser sees the finished page, so you get the actual data.
text.zh: 很多網頁是用 JavaScript 組出內容的。真實瀏覽器看得到完成後的頁面，你才抓得到真正的資料。

text.en: Convert pages to clean Markdown or structured JSON, perfect input for Workers AI or a RAG pipeline.
text.zh: 把網頁轉成乾淨的 Markdown 或結構化 JSON，正是 Workers AI 或 RAG 流程的理想輸入。

text.en: Spin up many browsers with low cold-start overhead, and reuse sessions to go even faster.
text.zh: 以很低的冷啟動成本開出大量瀏覽器，還能重用工作階段（session）跑得更快。

text.en: Generate thumbnail images of pages for social cards or a dashboard.
text.zh: 為社群卡片或儀表板產生網頁的縮圖。

text.en: Create invoices, tickets or reports from an HTML template, on the fly.
text.zh: 從 HTML 範本即時產生發票、票券或報表。

text.en: Collect prices, listings or articles from pages that need JavaScript to render.
text.zh: 從需要 JavaScript 才能呈現的網頁，蒐集價格、列表或文章。

text.en: Drive a real browser to click through and verify that your own site works.
text.zh: 操控真實瀏覽器點過一遍，驗證自家網站運作正常。

text.en: Quick way: the REST API
text.zh: 最快的方式：REST API

text.en: For one-off jobs you don't even need a Worker. Send a URL to an endpoint like /screenshot and get the result back. Other endpoints include /pdf, /content, /scrape, /snapshot, /json, /links and /markdown.
text.zh: 處理一次性工作時，你連 Worker 都不用寫。把網址送到像 /screenshot 這樣的端點，就能拿回結果。其他端點還有 /pdf、/content、/scrape、/snapshot、/json、/links 和 /markdown。

text.en: Full control: Puppeteer in a Worker
text.zh: 完全操控：在 Worker 裡用 Puppeteer

text.en: Add Cloudflare's Puppeteer package to your Worker project.
text.zh: 把 Cloudflare 版的 Puppeteer 套件加進你的 Worker 專案。

text.en: Declare a browser binding in wrangler.jsonc so env.MYBROWSER is available in code.
text.zh: 在 wrangler.jsonc 宣告一個 browser 繫結，程式裡就能用 env.MYBROWSER。

text.en: Launch Chromium, open a page, go to a URL and screenshot it. Always close the browser when done to free resources.
text.zh: 啟動 Chromium、開一個分頁、前往網址並截圖。用完一定要關閉瀏覽器以釋放資源。

text.en: Publish your Worker and call it from anywhere.
text.zh: 把 Worker 發佈出去，就能從任何地方呼叫。

text.en: A full browser running without a visible window — perfect for automation on a server.
text.zh: 一個沒有可見視窗、照常運作的完整瀏覽器——最適合在伺服器上做自動化。

text.en: Popular libraries that let your code tell the browser what to click, type and capture.
text.zh: 熱門的函式庫，讓你的程式碼告訴瀏覽器要點什麼、輸入什麼、擷取什麼。

text.en: REST endpoints are quick and code-free; bindings inside a Worker give full step-by-step control.
text.zh: REST 端點快速又免寫程式；Worker 裡的繫結則能逐步完全操控。

text.en: Reuse a warm browser across requests instead of launching a fresh one each time — faster and cheaper.
text.zh: 跨請求重用一個已暖機的瀏覽器，而不是每次都重開一個——更快也更省。

text.en: Call browser.close() (or reuse a session) when you're done. On the Free plan you get 10 minutes of browser time per day, so leaving browsers open wastes your quota.
text.zh: 做完後請呼叫 browser.close()（或重用 session）。免費方案每天只有 10 分鐘的瀏覽器時間，讓瀏覽器一直開著會白白用掉額度。

en: Free plan: up to 3 concurrent browsers, a new one every 20 seconds, and 10 minutes total per day.
Workers Paid plan: up to 120 concurrent browsers and a new one every second.
Browsers idle out after 60 seconds by default (extendable up to 10 minutes).
Reuse sessions to cut cold starts and stay within limits.
zh: 免費方案：最多同時 3 個瀏覽器，每 20 秒可新開一個，每天合計 10 分鐘。
Workers 付費方案：最多同時 120 個瀏覽器，每秒可新開一個。
瀏覽器預設閒置 60 秒後關閉（可延長至 10 分鐘）。
重用 session 可減少冷啟動，也比較不會撞到限制。
